config.not-riding-alert.title: Edit Configuration
config.not-riding-alert.globalEnable.too: Master switch to enable or disable all mod features
config.not-riding-alert.enabled.tooltip: Make an alert sound if the player is not riding any ride
config.not-riding-alert.soundId.tooltip: The sound ID to play when alerting (e.g., entity.experience_orb.pickup)
Dim the screen when riding to reduce distractions
config.not-riding-alert.fullbright.toolt: Control when full brightness is applied (client-side only)
config.not-riding-alert.cursorReleaseTim: When to automatically release the mouse cursor
config.not-riding-alert.enableTracker.to: Show the ride tracker HUD on screen
config.not-riding-alert.strategyHudRende: Choose between V0, V1 and V2 strategy HUD layouts
config.not-riding-alert.rideDisplayCount: Number of rides to show in the tracker (1-60)
config.not-riding-alert.rideDisplay.tool: Toggle whether this ride appears in the tracker
config.not-riding-alert.minRideTimeMinut: Do not display rides lower than this ride time in the tracker (0 = no filter)
config.not-riding-alert.maxGoal.tooltip: The maximum goal to track for rides (1K, 5K, or 10K)
config.not-riding-alert.hudBackgroundOpa: Opacity of the background for the strategy HUD (0-100)
config.not-riding-alert.hideScoreboard.t: Hide the scoreboard while still tracking ride data
config.not-riding-alert.hideChat.tooltip: Hide the chat for a cleaner interface
config.not-riding-alert.hideHealth.toolt: Hide the health bar for a cleaner interface
config.not-riding-alert.hideNameTag.tool: Hide player name tags for a cleaner interface
config.not-riding-alert.hideHotbar.toolt: Hide the hotbar for a cleaner interface
config.not-riding-alert.hideExperienceLe: Hide the experience level number for a cleaner interface
config.not-riding-alert.showAutograbRegi: Display visual outlines for autograb regions when nearby
config.not-riding-alert.onlyAutograbbing: Only show rides that have auto-grabbing support in the tracker
config.not-riding-alert.hideLovePotionMe: Hide system messages that contain love potion effects
config.not-riding-alert.minimizeWindow.t: When to automatically minimize the game window
config.not-riding-alert.trackerNormalCol: Color for normal ride entries in the tracker
config.not-riding-alert.trackerRidingCol: Color for the current ride being ridden
config.not-riding-alert.trackerErrorColo: Color for error messages in the tracker
When to highlight the closest ride to the player on the tracker
config.not-riding-alert.trackerClosestRi: Color for highlighting the closest ride to the player
config.not-riding-alert.audioBoostRemind: When to show reminders for missing audio boost
config.not-riding-alert.closedCaptionMod: Move [CC] messages from chat to overlay area on screen, with optional color coding by announcer
config.not-riding-alert.sortingRules.too: How goals should be sorted in the tracker
config.not-riding-alert.advanceNotice.to: Play a sound this many seconds before the ride ends (0 = disabled)
config.not-riding-alert.showSessionStats: Display daily ride count, ride time, rides per hour, and streak in the bottom-right corner
config.not-riding-alert.trackerDisplayMo: When to show the ride tracker HUD on screen
config.not-riding-alert.enableOpenAudioM: Automatically connect to OpenAudioMC audio sessions using a headless browser
config.not-riding-alert.rideReportNotify: How to notify you when a new daily ride report is available
config.not-riding-alert.randomRideOverri: When enabled, /randomride picks a random ride you still have an ongoing goal on and warps you there via /w. Falls back to the server's /randomride if you have no remaining goals.
config.not-riding-alert.showDailyPlanHud: Draw today's ride plan as a horizontal tree at the top of the screen. When on, the strategy HUD is hidden to make room.
